analysis.object: T553: Tropical Navier-Stokes Equations depth analysis

tropical_ns.description: Replace real +,* with MAX,+ in NS; tropical NS has MAX-PLUS velocity field
tropical_ns.reason: Tropical NS is EML-3: MAX operation is tropical analogue of oscillatory superposition

tropical_regularity.description: Tropical NS always regular: MAX operation has ceiling; no tropical blow-up
tropical_regularity.reason: Tropical MAX prevents unbounded growth; tropical NS stays EML-2/3

shadow_ns.description: Tropical NS is EML-2/3 shadow of real EML-inf NS
shadow_ns.reason: Shadow depth theorem: tropical NS is the EML-2 shadow of EML-inf real NS
